CheckTitle: 检查RDS DB instances have copy tags to 快照 enabled
Description: 检查RDS DB instances have copy tags to 快照 enabled, Aurora instances can not have this feature enabled at this level, they will have it at cluster level
Risk: If RDS 实例s are not configured to copy tags to 快照, it could lead to compliance issues as the 快照 will not inherit necessary metadata such as environment, owner, or purpose tags. This could result in inefficient tracking and management of RDS resources and their 快照.

Recommendation.Text: 确保the `CopyTagsToSnapshot` setting已启用 for all RDS 实例s to propagate instance tags to their 快照 for improved tracking and compliance.
